name: startup-blueprint-generator-agent
description: An Agentic AI system that transforms any raw startup idea into a complete, investor-ready business blueprint using RAG, LangFlow, and IBM Granite models.
problem_statement: IBM SkillsBuild AICTE 2026 - Problem Statement No. 20

agents.name: Market Intelligence Agent
agents.role: Retrieves and summarizes market size, trends, and competitor data using RAG

agents.name: Funding & Grants Agent
agents.role: Retrieves MSME schemes, angel networks, VCs, and government grants

agents.name: Legal & Compliance Agent
agents.role: Identifies business registration steps, IP filing, and regulatory requirements

agents.name: Blueprint Composer Agent
agents.role: Synthesizes all agent outputs into BMC, GTM plan, budget, and investor pitch summary
